prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为192→159→195→149→202，整体波动较大，近5年位次在149–202之间震荡，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约202名；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划2021–2024年均为4人，2025年缩减至3人；2026年计划增至5人，较2025年扩招约66.7%，显著增加招生名额，对竞争压力有缓和作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学（含上海医学院）为985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜排名第5（2026年），属全国顶尖高校层次，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（师德师风、学校管理相关事件），但2025年声誉偏正面（科研成果或重大荣誉）；抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度持续较高；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学（A）、公共卫生与预防医学（A+）、护理学（A-）、药学（A）等均为A类学科，与招生专业（临床医学八年制、护理学）高度匹配，学科实力顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学持续高热推荐（2024年），护理学为推荐专业；本省2026年物理类考生约11.39万人，较2025年11.74万人略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海，地域吸引力强；该校在本省招生占比极小（2025年物理类3人），跨省报考竞争主要受全国性因素影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次202名、2026年大幅扩招（3→5人）对竞争的缓和作用、本省物理类考生小幅减少以及临床医学类专业持续高热的社会热度，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约268名，区间218–318名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制正谊明道班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 暂无其他物理类招生专业。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 物理类仅有两个招生专业，临床医学八年制为顶尖专业，位次需求极高；护理学位次相对较低。位次在预测区间内（218–318名）建议以临床医学为冲刺目标，护理学为稳妥选择；位次明显优于区间下限可重点冲击临床医学。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 192 → 159 → 195 → 149 → 202, with overall large fluctuations. In the past 5 years, rankings oscillated between 149 and 202, with no obvious unilateral trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 202. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for Physics Category was 4 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 3 in 2025; the plan for 2026 increases to 5 students, an expansion of about 66.7% compared to 2025, significantly increasing enrollment slots, which alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University (including Shanghai Medical College) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 5th in the Soft Science main ranking (2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities, with strong appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative (related to teacher ethics and school management incidents), but for 2025 it is slightly positive (scientific research achievements or major honors); Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining sustained high application attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Clinical Medicine (A), Public Health and Preventive Medicine (A+), Nursing (A-), Pharmacy (A), etc., are all A-level disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine 8-year program, Nursing), with top-tier disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine continues to be highly recommended (2024), Nursing is a recommended major; the number of Physics Category candidates in this province for 2026 is approximately 113,900, slightly decreasing from 117,400 in 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure; Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal; the university's enrollment proportion in this province is very small (3 Physics Category students in 2025), and cross-province application competition is mainly influenced by national factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 202 in 2025, the significant expansion in 2026 (3 to 5 students) easing competition, the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in this province, and the sustained high social heat for Clinical Medicine majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will shift backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 268, with a range of 218–318.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year Zhengyi Mingdao Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- No other Physics Category enrollment majors currently.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Physics Category has only two enrollment majors. The Clinical Medicine 8-year program is a top-tier major with extremely high ranking requirements; Nursing has relatively lower ranking requirements. For rankings within the predicted range (218–318), it is recommended to aim for Clinical Medicine as a reach goal and Nursing as a safe choice; for rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range, focus on aiming for Clinical Medicine.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 1956 → 1350 → 1187 → 2556 → 2215 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, there was a forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). After the new college entrance examination reform in 2024, the ranking significantly shifted backward to 2556, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 2215. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2215. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for liberal arts/history category was 5 students each year from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 3 students in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan document does not include history category data, so it is considered as no enrollment plan according to the rules, and plan_change is treated as 0.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University (including Shanghai Medical College) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 5th on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), belonging to the top-tier national universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but in 2025 it was somewhat positive (scientific research achievements). It ranks 4th in Douyin popularity (high heat), indicating overall high attention. No obvious enrollment gaps or discontinuities have been observed. Nursing (A-) is the only major offered in the history category and corresponds to a strong discipline, with relatively strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The nursing major in 2024 (recommended) has a social popularity that is relatively hot. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in this province is approximately 53,100, a slight decrease from 54,700 in 2025. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal. The enrollment number for history category is extremely small (only 3 in 2025), so the competition for applications is greatly affected by the quota limit.
